name: Oklahoma Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Oklahoma - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Oklahoma Licensed Dietitians Committee
provider.parentOrganization: Oklahoma State Board of Medical Licensure and Supervision

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Verification
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration sent directly to the Board.

requiredDocuments.name: Official College Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly from the university showing your conferred degree.

requiredDocuments.name: Extended Background Check
requiredDocuments.description: Processed through the Oklahoma State Bureau of Investigation (OSBI).

requiredDocuments.name: Evidence of Legal Status
requiredDocuments.description: Form documenting your citizenship or qualified alien status.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does an Oklahoma dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial license application fee is $120. Additional fees apply for the required background check.

mainEntity.name: When does the Oklahoma license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Oklahoma licensed dietitian credential expires annually on October 31st. The renewal fee is $100.
No, Oklahoma only issues licenses for Dietitians (Licensed Dietitian). There are no specific licensing requirements or title protections for individuals claiming to be 'nutritionists' in the state.

mainEntity.name: Does Oklahoma have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: Oklahoma has enacted the Dietitian Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, dietitians still apply by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Oklahoma?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Oklahoma while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
